description: Bounded local session memory contract inspired by Mycelium prime/absorb/digest. This is file-backed operational memory, not an external vector database.

cycle.purpose: Build bounded startup context from session-state, learning-log, workflow, and capabilities.
Append a bounded operational learning note during work.
Record end-of-session handoff facts into learning and decision logs.

safetyRules: No overwrite of existing session or learning history.
No raw stack traces, secrets, PII, or generated JSON dumps in user-facing summaries.
Append-only tools must keep entries human-readable and bounded.
